plays.summary: WSN (127 wRC+) and CHC (110 wRC+) — both lineups grade as above-average run producers. Jake Irvin (4.94 xFIP) is the weaker arm, and the park (PF 103) is hitter-friendly. Model has 11.0, market is at 9.5 — over by +1.5 runs.

Both lineups grade below average — MIN at 83 wRC+ and BAL at 73. Weak bats on both sides suppress the total. Starters are evenly matched (Bailey Ober 4.09 / Shane Baz 3.97 xFIP). The park (PF 106) is hitter-friendly pulls the other way, but not enough to flip the lean. Model has 7.0, market is at 8.5 — under by -1.5 runs.

The park (PF 104) is hitter-friendly pulls the other way, but not enough to flip the lean. Model has 6.8, market is at 8.0 — under by -1.2 runs.
